name: Regal Asian Investments Limited
analysis: RG8 has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.8487. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
